required_check: Compare against Optimism smart-contract known issues before code review or draft report.
Compare against Optimism Blockchain/DLT known issues before promotion.
Search upstream reth and Ethereum Foundation status before op-reth promotion.

Reject ResolvedDelegateProxy storage-slot non-impact restatement.

Reject MAX_RESOURCE_LIMIT griefing restatement without new bypass.
